title.phon: om bar do trang drol gyi mön lam shuk so
title.en: The Prayer to Be Freed from the Precipitous Track of the Bardo

source.attribution: Taught by Padmasambhava and revealed by Tertön Karma Lingpa at Daglha Gonpo Palri, per the colophon. English translation from The Stairway to the Pure Lands by Lopen Phuntsho Gyaltshen (2009).

blocks.phon:
om la ma yi dam kha drö tsok la chak tsal lo
tsé wa chen pö lam na drang du sol
blocks.en:
Homage to the Guru, Yidams and the host of Dakinis!
Please lead my way through your great loving-care.

blocks.phon:
dak ni trul pé khor war khyam pé tsé
tö sam gom sum ma yeng ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when I linger about in the Samsara due to confusion,
On the luminous path of listening, reflection, and meditation,

blocks.phon:
ka gyü la ma nam kyi lam na drong
yum chok kha drö tsok kyi gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
O the lineage holding Guru's of the "Order," please lead my way!
The supreme mothers, the hosts of Dakinis, support me from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo!
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
ti muk drak pö khor war khyam pé tsé
chö ying yé shé sal wé ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when we linger about Samsara due to extreme ignorance,
On the luminous path, where the Dharmadhatu-gnosis is apparent,

blocks.phon:
chom den nam par nang dzé lam na drong
yum chok ying chuk ma yi gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
May the Bhagavan Vairocana lead my way,
The supreme mother Dhatvishvari support me from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo!
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
shyé dang drak pö khor war khyam pé tsé
mé long yé shé sal wé ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when we linger about Samsara due to extreme anger,
On the luminous path, where the mirror-like gnosis is apparent,

blocks.phon:
chom den dor jé sem pé lam na drong
yum chok sang gyé chen mé gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
May the Bhagavan Vajrasattva lead my way!
The supreme mother, Buddha Locana support us from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo!
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
nga gyal drak pö khor war khyam pé tsé
nyam nyi yé shé sal wé ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when we linger about Samsara due to extreme pride,
On the luminous path, where the equanimity gnosis is apparent,

blocks.phon:
chom den rin chen jung den lam na drong
yum chok ma ma ki yi gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
May the Bhagavan Ratnasambhava lead our way!
The supreme mother, Mamaki support us from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo!
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
dö chak drak pö khor war khyam pé tsé
sor tok yé shé sal wé ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when we linger about Samsara due to extreme desire,
On the luminous path, where the discriminative gnosis is apparent,

blocks.phon:
chom den nang wa ta yé lam na drong
yum chok gö kar mo yi gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
May the Bhagavan Amitabha lead our way!
The supreme mother, Pandara Visini support us from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo,
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
trak dok drak pö khor war khyam pé tsé
ja drub yé shé sal wé ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when we linger about Samsara due to extreme jealousy,
On the luminous path, where the accomplishment gnosis is apparent,

blocks.phon:
chom den dön yö drub pé lam na drong
yum chok dam tsik drol mé gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
May the Bhagavan Amogasiddhi lead our way!
The supreme mother, Samaya Tara support us from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo!
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
bak chak drak pö khor war khyam pé tsé
lhen kyé yé shé sal wé ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when we linger about Samsara due to extreme habitual propensities,
On the luminous path, where the co-emergence gnosis is apparent,

blocks.phon:
pa wo rik dzin nam kyi lam na drong
yum chok kha drö tsok kyi gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
May the heroic Vidyadharas lead our way!
The supreme mothers, the host of Dakinis, support us from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo,
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
trul nang drak pö khor war khyam pé tsé
ngang trak jik nang pang wé ö lam la
blocks.en:
At the time when we linger about Samsara due to extreme confusion,
On the luminous path, where fear and terrifying visions are abandoned,

blocks.phon:
chom den shi trö tsok kyi lam na drong
ying chuk tro mö tsok kyi gyab né kyor
blocks.en:
May the Bhagavan, the host of peaceful and wrathful deities lead our way!
The Dhatvishvaris and the host of female wrathful deities, support us from behind!

blocks.phon:
bar do jik pé trang lé dral du sol
yang dak dzok pé sang gyé sa ru kyol
blocks.en:
And please, free us from the precipitous path of the Bardo!
And may we be placed on the ground of the perfectly complete Buddhahood!

blocks.phon:
kyé ma
nam khé kham nam dra ru mi dang shying
sang gyé ting gé shying kham tong war shok
blocks.en:
O alas! Having no hostility toward the sphere of space,
May we see it as the pure land of the blue-colored Buddha!

blocks.phon:
chu yi kham nam dra ru mi dang shying
sang gyé kar pö shying du tong war shok
blocks.en:
Having no hostility toward the sphere of water,
May we see it as the pure land of the white-colored Buddha!

blocks.phon:
sa yi kham nam dra ru mi dang shying
sang gyé ser pö shying du tong war shok
blocks.en:
Having no hostility toward the sphere of earth,
May we see it as the pure land of the yellow-colored Buddha!

blocks.phon:
mé yi kham nam dra ru mi dang shying
sang gyé mar pö shying du tong war shok
blocks.en:
Having no hostility toward the sphere of fire,
May we see it as the pure land of the red-colored Buddha!

blocks.phon:
lung gi kham nam dra ru mi dang shying
sang gyé jang gü shying du tong war shok
blocks.en:
Having no hostility toward the sphere of air,
May we see it as the pure land of the green-colored Buddha!

blocks.phon:
ja tsön kham nam dra ru mi dang shying
sang gyé na tsok shying du tong war shok
blocks.en:
Having no hostility toward the sphere of rainbow lights,
May we see it as the pure land of the multi-colored Buddha!

blocks.phon:
dra ö zer sum dra ru mi dang shying
shi tro rab jam shying du tong war shok
blocks.en:
Having no hostility toward the trio of sound, light and rays,
May we see it as the pure land of the boundless numbers of peaceful and wrathful deities!

blocks.phon:
dra nam tam ché rang drar shé par shok
ö nam tam ché rang ö shé par shok
blocks.en:
May we recognize every sound as one's own sound!
May we recognize every light as one's own light!

blocks.phon:
zer nam tam ché rang zer shé par shok
bar do rang ngo rang gi shé par shok
blocks.en:
May we recognize every ray as one's own ray!
May we self-recognize our own identity in the Bardo!

blocks.phon: ku sum shying kham ngön du gyur war shok
blocks.en: And may we manifestly realize the pure land of the three Kayas!
